determinism_boundary: core+market-formulas = pure stdlib (now injected); hash excludes now/*_at meta; market internal forecast/price-feed = meta-layer outside Clearstra boundary (produces the order)

design_notes.lineage: HELIX (clearing/market cluster) -> Clearstra (deterministic clearing exchange platform). Independent git repo under D:/HELIX/Clearstra.
design_notes.thesis: One deterministic clearing kernel (price -> clear -> settle -> rehearse + clearing ledger) + N market packs. Each HELIX clearing project projects as a market via price/priority/payoff/shock_model.
design_notes.reference_market: CryoFuturesMarket (CryoFutures parity is the correctness anchor for price/settle)
design_notes.attestra_anchor: ReserveFlowMarket (clear() output -> AttestraBridge -> Attestra reserve-flow pack verdict=valid)
design_notes.complementarity: Clearstra COMPUTES allocations/settlements; Attestra ATTESTS them. clear() invariants (conservation/no_conflict/priority) are exactly Attestra's clearing verification predicates -> provable composition. Attestra ADR declared clearing computation out-of-scope; Clearstra is that half.

verify.unittests: python -m unittest discover -s tests: Ran 21 tests OK
verify.determinism: check_tree -> clean=True, 11 files (0 clock/network/random; math allowed)
verify.pricing_parity: time_factor(365)=1.0; CryoFutures premium composition (100*0.5*1)=50; scarcity_premium(0.8,4)=0.2; option_premium(10,100,0.5)=50 (matches CryoFutures/MineralShock real code)
verify.clear_correct_by_construction: clearing_invariants(clear(...)).all_hold True for supply in {0,30,60,100,200}; deterministic tie-break by party_id; conservation never exceeds supply
verify.attestra_composition_PROVEN: clear() -> to_attestra_packet() -> REAL Attestra reserve-flow pack -> verdict=valid (conservation/no_conflict/priority_order/clearing_integrity all valid). Cross-repo smoke against D:/HELIX/Attestra; Clearstra remains standalone (no runtime dependency).
